title: astragalus albifolius
intro: Astragalus albifolius, also known as the white-leaved milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus albifolius include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health, among others. It is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and can also be found in capsule or powder form in herbal supplements.
